title: No Tutorial
description: This mod will disable the annoying tutorial pop-ups. This allows the user to have a more enjoyable experience.
body:
# No Tutorial
### QOL. Client-Sided. Pop-Up Blocking
Say goodbye to annoying tutorial pop-ups and hello to uninterrupted gameplay! **No Tutorial** instantly disables all the in-game tutorial messages that interrupt your flow, letting you explore, build , and play without distractions.
## 💎 Why No Tutorial?
**Client-Sided** — Only affects your game; works anywhere without affecting others.

**Performance Friendly** — Lightweight and invisible, so your game stays smooth.

**Instant Freedom** — Suppresses all tutorial toasts automatically, keeping your screen clean and gameplay seamless.

**Perfect For:** exploring, building, survival runs, or just enjoying Minecraft without forced interruptions.
